token.title: Bot API Key
token.description: Your API key allow your bot to communicate with our API. DON'T SHARE IT WITH ANYONE!

dialog.title: Invite a teammate
dialog.description: Invite a new teammate to access {username}'s stats. This user won't be able to see or update the settings.

invited.title: Teammate invited
invited.emailSent: We sent an email to {username}. The invitation will expire in 7 days.
invited.emailFailed: We were not able to send an invitation to {userId}. You'll have to send the invitation link by yourself.

empty.title: No teammate
empty.description: No one except you has access to {username}'s stats. Invite a teammate to get started.

advancedStats.title: Advanced Stats
advancedStats.description: Enable advanced stats on {username}. Activating advanced statistics will result in the collection of non-anonymous data about your bot's servers and/or users. THIS ACTION IS IRREVERSIBLE!

toasts.disabledDescription: Stats collected to date won't be deleted from our database

webhook.title: Votes Webhook
webhook.description: Receive an alert when someone votes for {username}. The alert will be universal for all compatible sites you configure.

providers.title: Votes Providers
providers.description: Configure votes providers to receive votes data from them.

missing.title: Missing providers
missing.description: Your bot does not seems to be registered on the following votes providers. Please keep in mind that you have to register your bot on these websites in order to receive votes from them:

manualConfigDialog.title: Manual configuration
manualConfigDialog.description: Paste the webhook secret provided by Top.gg in your bot's dashboard integrations page.
manualConfigDialog.tokenDescription: You can find this token on Top.gg under your bot's dashboard > "Integrations & API".

resetAchievements.title: Reset Achievements
resetAchievements.description: Delete all current achievements and restore the default achievements. ALL CURRENT PROGRESS WILL BE LOST

dialog.description: You are about to reset all achievements of {username} and their current progress. This action cannot be undone and will immediately take effect!

deleteBot.title: Delete bot
deleteBot.description: Permanently delete {username} and all associated data.

dialog.description: You are about to delete {username} and all associated data such as stats, votes and bot information. This action cannot be undone and will immediately take effect!
